name: kaola-workflow
description: 6-phase Kaola-Workflow for Claude Code and Codex — Research, Ideation, Plan, Execute, Review, Finalize. Multi-model orchestration with resumable phase artifacts.

scripts.test: npm run test:kaola-workflow:claude && npm run test:kaola-workflow:codex
scripts.test:kaola-workflow:claude: bash -n install.sh uninstall.sh && node -e "JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('package.json', 'utf8')); JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('.claude-plugin/plugin.json', 'utf8'))" && node scripts/validate-workflow-contracts.js && node scripts/simulate-workflow-walkthrough.js && claude plugin validate .
